selection-kitchen-content.title: Select the Product from Kitchen Overhead Systems

products.title: Eurolifts Flap Door System
features: Ideal for overhead hanging cabinets.
Flap type fully openable door for easy assessibility.
The kit consists of Mechanism with Cover, Hinge Clip on Bracket, Allen Key and Self Tapping Screws.

products.title: Kitchen Pulldown System - Glass
features: Overhead Storage is now accessible.
Soft pulldown & Soft lift up feature.
Ability to adjust the load as per requirement.
Glass Baskets can easily be removed for cleaning and clipped back.

products.title: Shutter Lift Heavy
features: Shutter opening angle 100°
Door thickness: 16-28mm
Suitable for wooden and framed glass doors
Soft close Lift - up with and close, silent motion, easy to use fitting.
Suitable for Kitchen, Living Room, Office, bathroom

selection-wicker-content.title: Select the Product from Wicker Basket

products.title: Plastic Wicker Basket Soft Close
features: Modern Design: Sleek and contemporary design enhances the aesthetic appeal of your kitchen while adding functionality
Premium Material: Crafted with durable plastic wicker, featuring a sturdy wooden frame and slide, ensuring longevity and stability
Soft Close Mechanism: Equipped with a soft-close feature for gentle and noiseless closing, ...

products.title: Sleek Telescopic Drawer Slide
features: Manufactured out of stainless steel 304 grade.
Built-in soft close mechanism.
Precision ball bearings ensure smooth movement.
Full extension of drawer.
Easy for installation
Load Capacity: 35 kgs.

products.title: Wardrobe Pullout 2 - Shoe Rack (Soft Close)
features: Organise your footwears in a better way with these pull-out shoe racks.
Ready to use product that can be installed easily in any type of wardrobe.
Easy pullout ensures clear overview of stored item.
In-built soft closing ensures effortless functioning.

selection-midway-systems.title: Select the Product from Midway Systems

products.title: Kitchen Midway Systems
features: Maximise your kitchen space and get easy access to your daily kitchen tools
Easy to clip on shelves/racks that can be added / removed or repositioned as per your work convenience
Made of MS and Natural Wood which adds aesthetic appeal to your countertop

products.title: Shelf Tray
features: A multi-utility shelf tray that can be used in kitchens (waste-bin shutters, pantry unit shutters, overhead shutters, on the mid-way wall etc.), Wardrobes (for cosmetics, perfumes etc.) in bathroom cabinets & more.
This tray can be fitted on to the inner face of any shutter.
Designed for easy accessibility, clip-on mounting.

products.title: Cup Hanger
features: Manufactured out of SS 304.
Ideal for Hanging 6 cups.
Easy to fit on to the Ceiling of Cabinets.
Elegant & Cost effective design.

selection-mixer-lift-up.title: Select the Product : Mixer Lift Up Stand

products.title: Mixer Lift Up Stand
features: Stores appliances inside the cabinet, reducing countertop clutter.
Secure locking mechanism for safety.
Effortlessly smooth lifting and lowering.
